title: Digitalization Strategy for Local Planning
short_desc: A comprehensive business case and stakeholder alignment initiative that successfully eliminated shadow IT and led to the adoption of a unified enterprise IT system.
blueprint_desc: Conducted a deep-dive operational feasibility study and business case to centralize fragmented local planning workflows. Gathered diverse stakeholder requirements through targeted interviews, designed functional prototypes to validate alternative user journeys, and modeled financial impact scenarios. The resulting strategic roadmap successfully dismantled decentralized shadow IT processes and directly drove the executive adoption and deployment of a unified IT system architecture.
